message:
test(fcp-core): pin CapabilityConstraints predicates + error Display (u34oi)

Add crates/fcp-core/tests/capability_constraints_predicates.rs.
Bead asks for "CapabilityConstraint Display"; no singular type
exists — only the plural CapabilityConstraints set type
(capability.rs:1439), which has no Display impl. Tests pin the
actual user-facing surface: predicates and the Display formatting
of CredentialValidationError that operators see. 18/18 tests pass.

Pinned:

- Default is the empty constraint set (capability.rs:1472 documents
  empty == deny-all per C3.4).
- is_empty truth table: false when ANY single field is populated
  (resource_allow / resource_deny / max_calls / max_bytes /
  idempotency_key / credential_allow each exercised independently).
- max_calls=Some(0) marks non-empty (zero is a real constraint).
- is_credential_allowed default-deny: empty allow-list rejects
  every credential. Listed credential allowed; non-listed rejected
  even with non-empty allow-list.
- validate_credential returns Ok iff is_credential_allowed; Err
  variant is NotInCredentialAllow{credential_id} carrying the
  offending id verbatim.
- CredentialValidationError::NotInCredentialAllow Display format
  pinned exactly:
  "credential {uuid} not in capability's credential_allow".
- Serde JSON round-trip preserves all populated fields including
  credential_allow membership; default → empty `{}` JSON form
  (skip_serializing_if elision).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
